creator: ryangard@gmail.com
text:
Unable to compile the software -- When using make in graphings/png, following occurs.

[root@echo /usr/ports/graphics/png]# make
===>  Found saved configuration for png-1.5.12
=> libpng-1.5.15.tar.xz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://heanet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/libpng/libpng15/1.5.15/libpng-1.5.15.tar.xz
libpng-1.5.15.tar.xz                          100% of  701 kB  413 kBps
===> Fetching all distfiles required by png-1.5.15 for building
===>  Extracting for png-1.5.15
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for libpng-1.5.15.tar.xz.
tar: Unrecognized archive format
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/png.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/png.
[root@echo /usr/ports/graphics/png]#

How-To-Repeat: Run make command in graphics/png.
